[TalkFile_2026_대학발표_입시결과_조회-16.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29651659/TalkFile_2026_._._.-16.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
<title>2026 대학발표 입시결과</title>
<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Serif+KR:wght@400;600;700&family=Noto+Sans+KR:wght@300;400;500;700&display=swap');

:root {
  --navy: #0d2240;
  --blue: #1a4fa0;
  --sky: #2e86de;
  --accent: #e84545;
  --gold: #e09500;
  --green: #1a8a4a;
  --purple: #6d4fd1;
  --light: #f2f5fb;
  --white: #ffffff;
  --gray: #5f6e8a;
  --lgray: #8a97b0;
  --border: #d4dff0;
  --border-light: #e8edf8;
}

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

body {
  font-family: 'Noto Sans KR', sans-serif;
  background: var(--light);
  color: var(--navy);
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

/* ── HEADER ─────────────────────────── */
.hd {
  background: linear-gradient(140deg, #0a1d38 0%, #1a4fa0 100%);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 20px 16px 14px;
  position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
  z-index: 200;
  box-shadow: 0 3px 16px rgba(10,29,56,.35);
}
.hd-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.hd-badge {
  background: var(--accent); color: #fff;
  font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .8px;
  padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 4px; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.hd-title { font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; }
.hd-sub { font-size: 11px; opacity: .65; margin-top: 1px; }
.back-btn {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.16); border: none; color: #fff;
  width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0;
  font-size: 16px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}

.srch { position: relative; }
.srch input {
  width: 100%; padding: 10px 36px 10px 38px;
  border: none; border-radius: 9px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.14);
  color: #fff; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px;
  outline: none; transition: background .2s;
}
.srch input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,.45); }
.srch input:focus { background: rgba(255,255,255,.22); }
.srch-ico { position: absolute; left: 11px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); font-size: 14px; opacity: .55; }
.srch-x {
  position: absolute; right: 10px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.25); border: none; color: #fff;
  width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 10px; display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}

/* ── SEASON TABS (fixed bar, univ view only) ───────── */
.seasontabs {
  display: none;
  background: var(--white);
  border-bottom: 2px solid var(--border);
  position: fixed; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 150;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(13,34,64,.08);
  padding: 0 4px;
}
.seasontabs.show { display: flex; }
.stab {
  flex: 1; padding: 11px 6px;
  font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--lgray); background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
  border-bottom: 2.5px solid transparent; margin-bottom: -2px;
  transition: color .2s, border-color .2s;
}
.stab.on { color: var(--blue); border-bottom-color: var(--blue); }
.stab:disabled { color: #c3cbdc; cursor: default; }

/* ── MAIN ─────────────────────────── */
.main { padding: 14px 14px 50px; max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; }

.sec-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gray); margin: 4px 2px 10px; display:flex; align-items:baseline; gap:5px; }
.sec-label .cnt { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--lgray); }

/* university list */
.ulist { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 7px; }
.urow {
  background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--border-light); border-radius: 11px;
  padding: 12px 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .15s, box-shadow .15s;
}
.urow:active { background: #eef3fc; }
.urow-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--navy); }
.urow-meta { display: flex; gap: 5px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.ub { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 7px; border-radius: 20px; white-space: nowrap; }
.ub.susi { background: #dbeeff; color: var(--blue); }
.ub.jeongsi { background: #ffe7d6; color: var(--gold); }

/* search results on home */
#searchResults { display: none; }
.sr-block { margin-bottom: 18px; }
.sr-univ-item {
  background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--border-light); border-radius: 11px;
  padding: 11px 14px; margin-bottom: 7px; cursor: pointer; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13.5px;
  display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
}
.sr-univ-item .arrow { color: var(--lgray); font-size: 12px; }
.sr-note { font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--lgray); margin: 8px 2px 12px; }

/* chips */
.chiprow { display: flex; gap: 6px; overflow-x: auto; padding: 2px 0 14px; scrollbar-width: none; }
.chiprow::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
.chip {
  flex-shrink: 0; padding: 7px 13px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border); background: var(--white); color: var(--gray); cursor: pointer;
  white-space: nowrap; transition: all .15s;
}
.chip.on { background: var(--catclr, var(--blue)); border-color: var(--catclr, var(--blue)); color: #fff; }

#homeFilters { margin-top: 2px; }
#homeFilters .chiprow:first-child { padding-bottom: 7px; }
#homeFilters .chiprow:last-child { padding-bottom: 0; }
#homeFilters .chip { background: rgba(255,255,255,.14); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,.28); color: rgba(255,255,255,.92); }
#homeFilters .chip.on { background: var(--catclr, var(--blue)); border-color: var(--catclr, var(--blue)); color: #fff; }

/* local search + sort */
.localsrch {
  position: sticky; z-index: 140;
  background: var(--white);
  padding: 8px 0 12px;
  margin-bottom: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light);
}
.localsrch input {
  width: 100%; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: 9px;
  font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; outline: none; background: var(--white); color: var(--navy);
}
.localsrch input:focus { border-color: var(--blue); }
.sortrow { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px; }
#resultCount { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--blue); }
.sortrow select {
  font-family: inherit; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--navy);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 10px; background: var(--white);
}

/* cards */
#cardList, #srRows { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 9px; }
.card {
  background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--border-light); border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 13px 15px; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow .15s, border-color .15s;
}
.card:active { background: #f7f9fd; }
.card-top { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 4px; }
.card-dept { font-size: 14.5px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); }
.pill { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: nowrap; }
.card-track { font-size: 12px; color: var(--gray); margin-bottom: 7px; }
.card-stats { font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.card-stats b { color: var(--blue); font-weight: 700; }
.cut {
  font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--green); background: #eef9f1; border-radius: 7px;
  padding: 6px 9px; line-height: 1.55;
}
.cut b { font-weight: 700; }
.cut.muted { color: var(--lgray); background: var(--light); }

.empty-state { text-align: center; padding: 50px 20px; color: var(--lgray); font-size: 13px; }
.empty-state .ic { font-size: 30px; margin-bottom: 10px; opacity: .6; }

.footer-note {
  margin-top: 22px; padding: 13px 14px; background: #eef3fc; border-radius: 10px;
  font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray); line-height: 1.6;
}

/* ── MODAL ──────────────────────────── */
.modal-bg {
  display: none; position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(10,29,56,.55);
  z-index: 999; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 20px 16px;
}
.modal-bg.open { display: flex; }
.modal {
  background: var(--white); border-radius: 16px; width: 100%; max-width: 380px;
  max-height: 86vh; overflow-y: auto; box-shadow: 0 8px 40px rgba(10,29,56,.3);
  animation: popIn .18s ease;
}
@keyframes popIn { from { transform: scale(.94); opacity: 0; } to { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } }
.modal-hd {
  display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 10px;
  padding: 16px 16px 14px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--navy), var(--blue)); color: #fff;
  position: sticky; top: 0;
}
.modal-title { font-family: 'Noto Serif KR', serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 3px; }
.modal-sub { font-size: 11.5px; opacity: .75; }
.modal-close {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.2); border: none; color: #fff; width: 26px; height: 26px;
  border-radius: 50%; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
.modal-body { padding: 14px 16px 18px; }
.dtable { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.dtable tr { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-light); }
.dtable tr:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.dtable td { padding: 9px 4px; font-size: 12.5px; vertical-align: top; }
.dtable td:first-child { color: var(--gray); font-weight: 600; width: 38%; white-space: nowrap; }
.dtable td:last-child { color: var(--navy); font-weight: 600; text-align: right; }
.dtable.cuttable td:last-child { color: var(--blue); }
.mbtn {
  display: block; width: 100%; padding: 11px; margin-top: 6px; border-radius: 9px; border: none;
  background: var(--blue); color: #fff; font-family: inherit; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer;
}
.note-box {
  margin-top: 10px; padding: 9px 11px; background: var(--light); border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 11.5px; color: var(--gray); line-height: 1.55;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="hd" id="hd">
  <div class="hd-row" id="hdRowHome">
    <span class="hd-badge">2026학년도</span>
    <div>
      <div class="hd-title">대학발표 입시결과</div>
      <div class="hd-sub" id="hdSubHome">전국 212개 대학 · 수시·정시 모집결과</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hd-row" id="hdRowUniv" style="display:none">
    <button class="back-btn" id="backBtn">←</button>
    <div>
      <div class="hd-title" id="univTitle">대학명</div>
      <div class="hd-sub" id="univSub">수시 0건 · 정시 0건</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="srch" id="homeSrchWrap">
    <span class="srch-ico">🔍</span>
    <input type="text" id="sInput" placeholder="대학명 또는 학과명 검색 (예: 강원대, 간호학과)">
    <button class="srch-x" id="sX">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="homeFilters" id="homeFilters">
    <div class="chiprow" id="homeSeasonChips"><button class="chip on">전체</button></div>
    <div class="chiprow" id="homeCatChips"><button class="chip on">전체</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="seasontabs" id="seasonTabs"></div>

<div class="main" id="main">

  <div id="viewHome">
    <div id="searchResults"></div>
    <div id="homeList">
      <div class="sec-label">전체 대학 <span class="cnt" id="univCount"></span></div>
      <div class="ulist" id="ulist"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="viewUniv" style="display:none">
    <div class="chiprow" id="catChips"></div>
    <div class="localsrch" id="localSrch"><input type="text" id="deptSearch" placeholder="학과명 검색"></div>
    <div class="sortrow">
      <span id="resultCount"></span>
      <select id="sortSel">
        <option value="default">기본순</option>
        <option value="ratioDesc">경쟁률 높은순</option>
        <option value="ratioAsc">경쟁률 낮은순</option>
        <option value="recruitDesc">모집인원 많은순</option>
        <option value="name">학과명 가나다순</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div id="cardList"></div>
    <div class="footer-note">
      ※ 본 자료는 2026학년도 각 대학이 발표한 입시결과(경쟁률·충원·학생부/수능 컷)를 정리한 것입니다. 모집단위 통합·전형 변경 등으로 실제 2027학년도 모집과 다를 수 있으니 참고 자료로만 활용하세요.
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="modal-bg" id="modalBg">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-hd">
      <div>
        <div class="modal-title" id="mTitle"></div>
        <div class="modal-sub" id="mSub"></div>
      </div>
      <button class="modal-close" id="modalClose">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="mBody"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const DATA_B64 = "";

let DATA = null;
let searchIdx = [];
let univRowIdx = {};
let univSummary = [];
let currentUniv = null;
let currentSeason = 0;
let currentCat = null;
let deptQuery = '';
let sortMode = 'default';
let homeSeasonF = 'all';
let homeCatF = 'all';

const CAT_COLOR = {
  '학생부위주(교과)': '#1a4fa0',
  '학생부위주(종합)': '#1a8a4a',
  '논술위주': '#e09500',
  '수능위주': '#e84545',
  '실기/실적위주': '#2e86de',
  '기타': '#5f6e8a'
};
const CAT_ORDER = ['학생부위주(교과)','학생부위주(종합)','논술위주','실기/실적위주','수능위주','기타'];
function catSortKey(c){ const i = CAT_ORDER.indexOf(c); return i === -1 ? 999 : i; }
const CAT_ORDER_SUSI = ['학생부위주(교과)','학생부위주(종합)','논술위주','실기/실적위주','기타'];
const CAT_ORDER_JEONGSI = ['수능위주','학생부위주(교과)','학생부위주(종합)','실기/실적위주','기타'];
function catSortKeyForSeason(c, season){
  const order = season === 1 ? CAT_ORDER_JEONGSI : CAT_ORDER_SUSI;
  const i = order.indexOf(c);
  return i === -1 ? 999 : i;
}
function catColor(c){ return CAT_COLOR[c] || '#5f6e8a'; }
function catBg(c){
  const hex = catColor(c).replace('#','');
  const r=parseInt(hex.slice(0,2),16), g=parseInt(hex.slice(2,4),16), b=parseInt(hex.slice(4,6),16);
  return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},.12)`;
}

function base64ToBytes(b64){
  const bin = atob(b64);
  const bytes = new Uint8Array(bin.length);
  for (let i = 0; i < bin.length; i++) bytes[i] = bin.charCodeAt(i);
  return bytes;
}

async function loadData(){
  try {
    const bytes = base64ToBytes(DATA_B64);
    const ds = new DecompressionStream('gzip');
    const stream = new Blob([bytes]).stream().pipeThrough(ds);
    const text = await new Response(stream).text();
    DATA = JSON.parse(text);
  } catch(e){
    document.getElementById('ulist').innerHTML =
      '<div class="empty-state"><div class="ic">⚠️</div>최신 브라우저(Chrome/Safari 최신 버전)에서 열어주세요.<br>데이터 압축 해제에 실패했습니다.</div>';
    return;
  }
  buildIndexes();
  renderHomeFilters();
  renderHomeList();
  adjustLayout();
}

function buildIndexes(){
  searchIdx = DATA.rows.map(r =>
    (DATA.univs[r[0]] + ' ' + DATA.depts[r[5]] + ' ' + DATA.tracks[r[4]] + ' ' + DATA.cats[r[3]] + ' ' + DATA.groups[r[6]]).toLowerCase()
  );
  univRowIdx = {};
  DATA.rows.forEach((r,i) => {
    if(!univRowIdx[r[0]]) univRowIdx[r[0]] = [];
    univRowIdx[r[0]].push(i);
  });
  univSummary = DATA.univs.map((name, uIdx) => {
    const idxs = univRowIdx[uIdx] || [];
    let s = 0, j = 0;
    idxs.forEach(i => { if (DATA.rows[i][1] === 0) s++; else j++; });
    return { uIdx, name, susi: s, jeongsi: j, total: idxs.length };
  });
  univSummary.sort((a,b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name, 'ko'));
  document.getElementById('hdSubHome').textContent =
    `전국 ${univSummary.length}개 대학 · 총 ${DATA.rows.length.toLocaleString()}건 모집결과`;
}

function renderHomeFilters(){
  const seasonOpts = [['all','전체',null], [0,'수시','#1a4fa0'], [1,'정시','#e09500']];
  document.getElementById('homeSeasonChips').innerHTML = seasonOpts.map(([v,label,clr]) =>
    `<button class="chip ${homeSeasonF===v?'on':''}" style="${clr?`--catclr:${clr}`:''}">${label}</button>`
  ).join('');
  document.querySelectorAll('#homeSeasonChips .chip').forEach((b,idx) => {
    b.onclick = () => { homeSeasonF = seasonOpts[idx][0]; renderHomeFilters(); doHomeSearch(sInput.value.trim()); };
  });

  let catHtml = `<button class="chip ${homeCatF==='all'?'on':''}" data-v="all">전체</button>`;
  [...DATA.cats].sort((a,b) => catSortKey(a)-catSortKey(b)).forEach(c => {
    const i = DATA.cats.indexOf(c);
    catHtml += `<button class="chip ${homeCatF===i?'on':''}" data-v="${i}" style="--catclr:${catColor(c)}">${c}</button>`;
  });
  document.getElementById('homeCatChips').innerHTML = catHtml;
  document.querySelectorAll('#homeCatChips .chip').forEach((b) => {
    b.onclick = () => {
      homeCatF = b.dataset.v === 'all' ? 'all' : parseInt(b.dataset.v);
      renderHomeFilters(); doHomeSearch(sInput.value.trim());
    };
  });
}

function renderHomeList(){
  document.getElementById('univCount').textContent = `(${univSummary.length})`;
  document.getElementById('ulist').innerHTML = univSummary.map(u => `
    <div class="urow" data-u="${u.uIdx}">
      <div class="urow-name">${u.name}</div>
      <div class="urow-meta">
        ${u.susi ? `<span class="ub susi">수시 ${u.susi}</span>` : ''}
        ${u.jeongsi ? `<span class="ub jeongsi">정시 ${u.jeongsi}</span>` : ''}
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
}

document.getElementById('ulist').addEventListener('click', e => {
  const row = e.target.closest('.urow');
  if (row) openUniv(parseInt(row.dataset.u));
});

/* ── HOME SEARCH ──────────────────────────── */
let searchDebounce = null;
const sInput = document.getElementById('sInput');
const sX = document.getElementById('sX');
sInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
  const q = sInput.value.trim();
  sX.style.display = q ? 'flex' : 'none';
  clearTimeout(searchDebounce);
  searchDebounce = setTimeout(() => doHomeSearch(q), 120);
});
sX.addEventListener('click', () => { sInput.value=''; sX.style.display='none'; doHomeSearch(''); });

function renderFilteredUnivList(resBox){
  const counts = {};
  DATA.rows.forEach(r => {
    if (homeSeasonF !== 'all' && r[1] !== homeSeasonF) return;
    if (homeCatF !== 'all' && r[3] !== homeCatF) return;
    counts[r[0]] = (counts[r[0]] || 0) + 1;
  });
  const matched = univSummary.filter(u => counts[u.uIdx]);

  let html = `<div class="sr-block"><div class="sec-label">대학 검색결과 <span class="cnt">(${matched.length})</span></div>`;
  if (matched.length){
    html += matched.map(u => `
      <div class="sr-univ-item" data-u="${u.uIdx}">
        <span>${u.name}</span>
        <span class="arrow">${counts[u.uIdx]}건 ›</span>
      </div>`).join('');
  } else {
    html += `<div class="empty-state"><div class="ic">🔍</div>선택한 조건에 맞는 대학이 없습니다.</div>`;
  }
  html += `</div>`;
  resBox.innerHTML = html;
  resBox.querySelectorAll('.sr-univ-item').forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('click', () => openUniv(parseInt(el.dataset.u)));
  });
}

function doHomeSearch(q){
  const resBox = document.getElementById('searchResults');
  const listBox = document.getElementById('homeList');
  const hasFilter = homeSeasonF !== 'all' || homeCatF !== 'all';
  if (!q && !hasFilter){ resBox.style.display='none'; resBox.innerHTML=''; listBox.style.display='block'; return; }
  listBox.style.display='none';
  resBox.style.display='block';

  if (!q && hasFilter){
    renderFilteredUnivList(resBox);
    return;
  }

  const ql = q.toLowerCase();
  const tokens = ql.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
  const matchedUnivs = q ? univSummary.filter(u => u.name.toLowerCase().includes(ql)).slice(0, 25) : [];

  const matchedRows = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < searchIdx.length; i++){
    const r = DATA.rows[i];
    if (homeSeasonF !== 'all' && r[1] !== homeSeasonF) continue;
    if (homeCatF !== 'all' && r[3] !== homeCatF) continue;
    if (tokens.length && !tokens.every(t => searchIdx[i].includes(t))) continue;
    matchedRows.push(i);
    if (matchedRows.length >= 120) break;
  }

  let html = '';
  if (matchedUnivs.length){
    html += `<div class="sr-block"><div class="sec-label">대학 검색결과 <span class="cnt">(${matchedUnivs.length})</span></div>`;
    html += matchedUnivs.map(u => `
      <div class="sr-univ-item" data-u="${u.uIdx}">
        <span>${u.name}</span>
        <span class="arrow">수시 ${u.susi} · 정시 ${u.jeongsi} ›</span>
      </div>`).join('');
    html += `</div>`;
  }
  html += `<div class="sr-block"><div class="sec-label">학과·전형 검색결과 <span class="cnt">(${matchedRows.length}${matchedRows.length>=120?'+':''})</span></div>`;
  if (matchedRows.length){
    html += `<div id="srRows">` + matchedRows.map(i => renderCard(i, true)).join('') + `</div>`;
    if (matchedRows.length >= 120) html += `<div class="sr-note">검색 결과가 많아 상위 120건만 표시합니다. 검색어를 구체적으로 입력해보세요.</div>`;
  } else if (!matchedUnivs.length){
    const emptyText = q ? `"${q}"에 대한 검색 결과가 없습니다.` : '선택한 조건에 맞는 결과가 없습니다.';
    html += `<div class="empty-state"><div class="ic">🔍</div>${emptyText}</div>`;
  }
  html += `</div>`;
  resBox.innerHTML = html;

  resBox.querySelectorAll('.sr-univ-item').forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('click', () => openUniv(parseInt(el.dataset.u)));
  });
  resBox.querySelectorAll('.card').forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('click', () => openModal(parseInt(el.dataset.i), true));
  });
}

/* ── UNIV DETAIL VIEW ──────────────────────────── */
function openUniv(uIdx){
  currentUniv = uIdx;
  const idxs = univRowIdx[uIdx] || [];
  let s=0,j=0;
  idxs.forEach(i => { if (DATA.rows[i][1]===0) s++; else j++; });

  let season = null, cat = null;

  if (homeSeasonF !== 'all' && idxs.some(i => DATA.rows[i][1] === homeSeasonF)){
    season = homeSeasonF;
  }
  if (homeCatF !== 'all'){
    if (season !== null){
      if (idxs.some(i => DATA.rows[i][1]===season && DATA.rows[i][3]===homeCatF)) cat = DATA.cats[homeCatF];
    } else {
      const inSusi = idxs.some(i => DATA.rows[i][1]===0 && DATA.rows[i][3]===homeCatF);
      const inJeongsi = idxs.some(i => DATA.rows[i][1]===1 && DATA.rows[i][3]===homeCatF);
      if (inSusi){ season = 0; cat = DATA.cats[homeCatF]; }
      else if (inJeongsi){ season = 1; cat = DATA.cats[homeCatF]; }
    }
  }
  currentSeason = season !== null ? season : (s > 0 ? 0 : 1);
  currentCat = cat;

  deptQuery = ''; sortMode = 'default';
  document.getElementById('deptSearch').value = '';
  document.getElementById('sortSel').value = 'default';

  document.getElementById('hdRowHome').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('homeSrchWrap').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('homeFilters').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('hdRowUniv').style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('univTitle').textContent = DATA.univs[uIdx];
  document.getElementById('univSub').textContent = `수시 ${s}건 · 정시 ${j}건`;
  document.getElementById('seasonTabs').classList.add('show');

  document.getElementById('viewHome').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('viewUniv').style.display = 'block';

  renderSeasonTabs();
  renderCatChips();
  applyFilters();
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
  adjustLayout();
}

document.getElementById('backBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
  currentUniv = null;
  document.getElementById('hdRowUniv').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('hdRowHome').style.display = 'flex';
  document.getElementById('homeSrchWrap').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('homeFilters').style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('seasonTabs').classList.remove('show');
  document.getElementById('viewUniv').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('viewHome').style.display = 'block';
  sX.style.display = sInput.value.trim() ? 'flex' : 'none';
  doHomeSearch(sInput.value.trim());
  window.scrollTo(0,0);
  adjustLayout();
});

function renderSeasonTabs(){
  const idxs = univRowIdx[currentUniv] || [];
  let s=0,j=0;
  idxs.forEach(i => { if (DATA.rows[i][1]===0) s++; else j++; });
  document.getElementById('seasonTabs').innerHTML = `
    <button class="stab ${currentSeason===0?'on':''}" data-s="0" ${s===0?'disabled':''}>수시 (${s})</button>
    <button class="stab ${currentSeason===1?'on':''}" data-s="1" ${j===0?'disabled':''}>정시 (${j})</button>`;
  document.querySelectorAll('.stab').forEach(b => {
    b.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (b.disabled) return;
      currentSeason = parseInt(b.dataset.s);
      currentCat = null;
      renderSeasonTabs(); renderCatChips(); applyFilters();
    });
  });
}

function renderCatChips(){
  const idxs = (univRowIdx[currentUniv] || []).filter(i => DATA.rows[i][1] === currentSeason);
  const counts = {};
  idxs.forEach(i => { const c = DATA.cats[DATA.rows[i][3]]; counts[c] = (counts[c]||0)+1; });
  const cats = Object.keys(counts).sort((a,b) => catSortKeyForSeason(a, currentSeason) - catSortKeyForSeason(b, currentSeason));
  let html = `<button class="chip ${currentCat===null?'on':''}" data-cat="" style="--catclr:#1a4fa0">전체 (${idxs.length})</button>`;
  html += cats.map(c => `<button class="chip ${currentCat===c?'on':''}" data-cat="${c}" style="--catclr:${catColor(c)}">${c} (${counts[c]})</button>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('catChips').innerHTML = html;
  document.querySelectorAll('#catChips .chip').forEach(b => {
    b.addEventListener('click', () => {
      currentCat = b.dataset.cat || null;
      renderCatChips(); applyFilters();
    });
  });
}

document.getElementById('deptSearch').addEventListener('input', e => {
  deptQuery = e.target.value.trim();
  applyFilters();
});
document.getElementById('sortSel').addEventListener('change', e => {
  sortMode = e.target.value;
  applyFilters();
});

function applyFilters(){
  let idxs = (univRowIdx[currentUniv] || []).filter(i => DATA.rows[i][1] === currentSeason);
  if (currentCat) idxs = idxs.filter(i => DATA.cats[DATA.rows[i][3]] === currentCat);
  if (deptQuery){
    const tokens = deptQuery.toLowerCase().split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
    idxs = idxs.filter(i => tokens.every(t => searchIdx[i].includes(t)));
  }
  idxs = sortRows(idxs, sortMode);
  document.getElementById('resultCount').textContent = `${idxs.length}건`;
  const list = document.getElementById('cardList');
  if (idxs.length){
    list.innerHTML = idxs.map(i => renderCard(i, false)).join('');
  } else {
    list.innerHTML = `<div class="empty-state"><div class="ic">📭</div>조건에 맞는 결과가 없습니다.</div>`;
  }
  list.querySelectorAll('.card').forEach(el => {
    el.addEventListener('click', () => openModal(parseInt(el.dataset.i), false));
  });
}

function sortRows(idxs, mode){
  const arr = idxs.slice();
  if (mode === 'ratioDesc') arr.sort((a,b) => (DATA.rows[b][10] ?? -1) - (DATA.rows[a][10] ?? -1));
  else if (mode === 'ratioAsc') arr.sort((a,b) => (DATA.rows[a][10] ?? 999) - (DATA.rows[b][10] ?? 999));
  else if (mode === 'recruitDesc') arr.sort((a,b) => (DATA.rows[b][8] ?? 0) - (DATA.rows[a][8] ?? 0));
  else if (mode === 'name') arr.sort((a,b) => DATA.depts[DATA.rows[a][5]].localeCompare(DATA.depts[DATA.rows[b][5]], 'ko'));
  else arr.sort((a,b) => catSortKeyForSeason(DATA.cats[DATA.rows[a][3]], currentSeason) - catSortKeyForSeason(DATA.cats[DATA.rows[b][3]], currentSeason));
  return arr;
}

function renderCard(i, showUniv){
  const r = DATA.rows[i];
  const univ = DATA.univs[r[0]], term = DATA.terms[r[2]], cat = DATA.cats[r[3]],
        trackFull = DATA.tracks[r[4]], dept = DATA.depts[r[5]], day = DATA.days[r[7]];
  const recruit = r[8], ratio = r[10], fill = r[11], rIdx = r[12],
        gpa50 = r[13], gpa70 = r[14], csat50 = r[15], csat70 = r[16];
  const trackShort = trackFull.split('-').pop();

  let cutHtml;
  if (gpa50 != null || gpa70 != null || csat50 != null || csat70 != null){
    const parts = [];
    if (gpa50 != null) parts.push(`학생부 50%cut <b>${gpa50}등급</b>`);
    if (gpa70 != null) parts.push(`70%cut <b>${gpa70}등급</b>`);
    if (csat50 != null) parts.push(`수능백분위 50%cut <b>${csat50}</b>`);
    if (csat70 != null) parts.push(`70%cut <b>${csat70}</b>`);
    cutHtml = `<div class="cut">${parts.join(' · ')}</div>`;
  } else if (rIdx >= 0){
    cutHtml = `<div class="cut muted">컷 정보 미제출 · ${DATA.reasons[rIdx]}</div>`;
  } else {
    cutHtml = `<div class="cut muted">컷 정보 없음</div>`;
  }

  return `<div class="card" data-i="${i}">
    <div class="card-top">
      <div class="card-dept">${dept}</div>
      <span class="pill" style="background:${catBg(cat)};color:${catColor(cat)}">${cat}</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card-track">${term} · ${trackShort}${day==='야간' ? ' · 야간' : ''}${showUniv ? ' · ' + univ : ''}</div>
    <div class="card-stats">모집 <b>${recruit ?? '-'}</b> · 경쟁률 <b>${ratio != null ? ratio + ':1' : '-'}</b>${fill != null ? ' · 충원순위 <b>' + fill + '위</b>' : ''}</div>
    ${cutHtml}
  </div>`;
}

/* ── MODAL ──────────────────────────── */
function openModal(i, fromGlobal){
  const r = DATA.rows[i];
  const univ = DATA.univs[r[0]], term = DATA.terms[r[2]], cat = DATA.cats[r[3]],
        trackFull = DATA.tracks[r[4]], dept = DATA.depts[r[5]], group = DATA.groups[r[6]], day = DATA.days[r[7]];
  const recruit = r[8], finalN = r[9], ratio = r[10], fill = r[11], rIdx = r[12],
        gpa50 = r[13], gpa70 = r[14], csat50 = r[15], csat70 = r[16];

  document.getElementById('mTitle').textContent = dept;
  document.getElementById('mSub').textContent = `${univ} · ${term} · ${group}${day==='야간' ? ' · 야간' : ''}`;

  let rows = '';
  rows += `<tr><td>전형명</td><td>${trackFull.split('-').pop()}</td></tr>`;
  rows += `<tr><td>전형구분</td><td>${cat}</td></tr>`;
  rows += `<tr><td>모집인원</td><td>${recruit ?? '-'}명</td></tr>`;
  if (finalN != null && finalN !== recruit) rows += `<tr><td>최종 모집인원(이월포함)</td><td>${finalN}명</td></tr>`;
  rows += `<tr><td>경쟁률</td><td>${ratio != null ? ratio + ' : 1' : '-'}</td></tr>`;
  rows += `<tr><td>충원 순위</td><td>${fill != null ? fill + '위' : '-'}</td></tr>`;
  let html = `<table class="dtable">${rows}</table>`;

  let cutRows = '';
  if (gpa50 != null) cutRows += `<tr><td>학생부 50%cut</td><td>${gpa50}등급</td></tr>`;
  if (gpa70 != null) cutRows += `<tr><td>학생부 70%cut</td><td>${gpa70}등급</td></tr>`;
  if (csat50 != null) cutRows += `<tr><td>수능 백분위 50%cut</td><td>${csat50}</td></tr>`;
  if (csat70 != null) cutRows += `<tr><td>수능 백분위 70%cut</td><td>${csat70}</td></tr>`;
  if (cutRows){
    html += `<table class="dtable cuttable">${cutRows}</table>`;
  } else {
    html += `<div class="note-box">컷 정보가 공개되지 않았습니다.${rIdx>=0 ? ' (' + DATA.reasons[rIdx] + ')' : ''}</div>`;
  }

  if (fromGlobal){
    html += `<button class="mbtn" id="mGoUniv" data-u="${r[0]}">${univ} 입시결과 전체보기</button>`;
  }

  document.getElementById('mBody').innerHTML = html;
  document.getElementById('modalBg').classList.add('open');

  const goBtn = document.getElementById('mGoUniv');
  if (goBtn) goBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    closeModal();
    openUniv(parseInt(goBtn.dataset.u));
  });
}
function closeModal(){ document.getElementById('modalBg').classList.remove('open'); }
document.getElementById('modalClose').addEventListener('click', closeModal);
document.getElementById('modalBg').addEventListener('click', e => {
  if (e.target.id === 'modalBg') closeModal();
});

/* ── LAYOUT ──────────────────────────── */
function adjustLayout(){
  const hd = document.getElementById('hd');
  const tabs = document.getElementById('seasonTabs');
  const main = document.getElementById('main');
  const localSrch = document.getElementById('localSrch');
  const hdH = hd.offsetHeight;
  tabs.style.top = hdH + 'px';
  const tabsH = tabs.classList.contains('show') ? tabs.offsetHeight : 0;
  main.style.paddingTop = (hdH + tabsH + 14) + 'px';
  localSrch.style.top = (hdH + tabsH) + 'px';
}
window.addEventListener('resize', adjustLayout);
window.addEventListener('load', loadData);
</script>
</body>
</html>
